trivia_bullets.text: Thrill of Possibility debuted in Throne of Eldraine (ELD, October 2019) and was reprinted in Core Set 2021 (M21, July 2020). It has since become one of red's most-reprinted cantrip-discard spells, appearing across Theros Beyond Death, Strixhaven Mystical Archive (two treatments), Dominaria United, Jumpstart 2022, Phyrexia: All Will Be One, Tales of Middle-earth Commander, Foundations, and even the Marvel Universe crossover set — 18 distinct printings as of 2026. [Scryfall prints search]

EDHREC ranks Thrill of Possibility at 202 overall, placing it among the most-included red cards in Commander — appearing in over 400,000 registered decks. Its {1}{R} cost and instant speed make it the go-to rummage spell for red Commander decks, particularly in madness, discard-payoff, and reanimator shells. [EDHREC: edhrec.com/cards/thrill-of-possibility]
The card is legal in Pauper format at common rarity, placing it in competition with other red looting spells in that format. [Scryfall legalities]

Artist Izzy (credited as a single mononym) has over 220 Magic illustrations to their credit, including the notorious Worldfire (M13). Izzy's work spans both the Thrill of Possibility art (depicting a human face consumed by fire in a moment of creation) and several other high-profile red instant and sorcery cards. [Scryfall artist field; gatherer.wizards.com artist search for Izzy]

Flavor text: "Right now, in these first moments of creation, it is simultaneously nothing and everything." The speaker is unnamed, framing the act of discarding-to-draw as a cosmological act of destruction enabling creation — appropriate for a card that mechanically trades one card for two. [Scryfall]

related_cards.name: Faithless Looting
related_cards.note: The benchmark red rummage spell; Thrill of Possibility is frequently compared to it for instant-speed advantage at higher mana cost

related_cards.name: Cathartic Reunion
related_cards.note: Discard-2-draw-3 at sorcery speed; forms the discard-draw triumvirate with Thrill in red Commander and Pauper

related_cards.name: Worldfire
related_cards.note: Also illustrated by artist Izzy; shares the creation-destruction thematic register

related_cards.name: Tormenting Voice
related_cards.note: Functional predecessor: discard 1, draw 2 at sorcery speed; directly compared in format discussions
